note: R534: Saturation 第 10 轮连续。7 源全扫（Anthropic sitemap 477 / OpenAI RSS 8 / Claude Blog / Cursor Blog / CrewAI / HN Algolia / GitHub Search API 6 候选）→ 16/16 cluster overlap 或商业/政策 filter → 0 NEW。R525 三角验证协议 6 候选 audit 全部命中已收录（recall 4 hits context-memory / cloudflare-security-audit-skill 5 hits security）。Path A 饱和期合法性三条件全部满足。
